name: Brooklyn Funding Group
description_short: Brooklyn Funding Group provides short-term and long-term real estate financing for fix-and-flip projects, new construction, multifamily properties, and rental portfolios. No upfront fees, no tax returns required.
description_long:
Brooklyn Funding Group Ltd is a real estate lender specializing in creative financing solutions for property investors and developers across the Northeast, with a stated focus on flexibility and quick closing timelines. Founded and actively operating since at least 2020, the company positions itself as a direct lender offering hassle-free funding for various real estate investment strategies without traditional lending barriers.

The company offers four primary loan products: Fix & Flip loans for 1-4 unit properties (up to 90% LTC, rates starting at 7.75%), New Construction financing covering 100% construction costs for 1-4 units and multifamily projects, Multifamily Bridge loans for institutional investors seeking temporary financing, and long-term Rental portfolio financing (up to 80% LTV). All products advertise no upfront fees and no tax return requirements, positioning the lender as an alternative to conventional mortgage sources. The company provides recent funded deal examples from Binghamton NY, Newark NJ, and Manhasset NY.

Brooklyn Funding Group emphasizes relationship-based lending, claiming to differentiate through exceptional service and consistent communication with repeat clients and experienced investors. Their marketing targets active real estate investors with multiple properties or development experience. The company operates a physical lending process with a dedicated phone line (1-917-830-7144) and online application portal, suggesting a hybrid in-person and digital operation model.

While the website provides clear product descriptions and competitive terms (7.75% starting rates), it offers minimal transparency regarding approval criteria, actual APRs, closing costs, prepayment penalties, or terms for different credit profiles. The stated requirement of "no experience? no problem" suggests they may serve newer investors, but eligibility requirements remain unstated. No third-party reviews, regulatory licensing information, or complaint history are presented on the site.
pros: Advertises no upfront fees and no tax returns required, reducing borrower friction
Offers competitive fix-and-flip rates starting at 7.75% for short-term real estate loans
Provides up to 90% LTC (loan-to-cost) on fix-and-flip and up to 100% construction financing for new builds
Covers diverse property types from single-family to multifamily and new construction
Claims expedited closing and direct funding to enable rapid deal completion
Highlights repeat client relationships and institutional investor track record with recent funded deals
Accessible application process with online portal and direct phone support
cons: Website provides no details on actual APRs, closing costs, prepayment penalties, or loan term length
No stated eligibility requirements, credit score minimums, or debt-to-income guidelines despite no-tax-return claim
No third-party reviews, regulatory licensing verification, or Better Business Bureau/NMLS information visible
Limited transparency on experience/qualifications required despite "no experience? no problem" marketing claim
Vague asset requirements and qualification process despite claiming to serve diverse investor profiles
best_for: Active real estate investors and house flippers seeking short-term fix-and-flip financing with fast closing
Multifamily property owners and institutional investors needing bridge or refinance financing
New construction developers and builders requiring construction-to-permanent financing options
Real estate investors building rental portfolios who want long-term portfolio lending with higher LTV options
diagnosis: Brooklyn Funding Group is best for experienced and active real estate investors seeking fast, flexible financing for fix-and-flip, new construction, or multifamily deals without traditional lending documentation requirements. However, borrowers should request detailed APR, closing cost, and term information before committing, as the website lacks transparency on actual pricing and qualification criteria despite prominent rate advertising.
services: Fix & Flip short-term loans (up to 90% LTC, up to 75% ARV)
New Construction financing (100% construction, up to 85% of total project cost)
Multifamily Bridge loans for purchase and refinance
Long-term Rental portfolio financing (up to 80% LTV)
Direct funding and rapid closing services
Equity pull-out/refinance services for existing rental properties
